# Enfortumab Vedotin 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Enfortumab Vedotin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Enfortumab Vedotin</strong> 目前有 <strong>30 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Enfortumab Vedotin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Padcev, in combination with pembrolizumab, is indicated for the first-line treatment of adult patients with unresectable or metastatic urothelial cancer who are eligible for platinum-containing...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>leprosy（99.5%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（99.4%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（99.4%）</li>
<li>candidiasis（99.3%）</li>
<li>cerebral infarction（99.2%）</li>
<li>HIV infectious disease（99.2%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（99.2%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（99.1%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（99.1%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（98.9%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（98.9%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（98.9%）</li>
<li>oral candidiasis（98.9%）</li>
<li>cerebral arterial disease（98.9%）</li>
<li>coronary artery disease（98.9%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（98.7%）</li>
<li>breast fibrocystic disease（98.7%）</li>
<li>commissural lip fistula（98.6%）</li>
<li>osteoradionecrosis of the mandible（98.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/enfortumab-vedotin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
